zh.Meriden, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅利登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Whitacre於1272年出生在英國瓦維其可爾梅利登時，他的父親Simon de Whitacre28歲，母親Isolade DeWhitacre28歲。他和Richard de Whitacre至少有1個兒子。他去世於1300年在英國瓦維其可爾享年28歲。

zh-hans.Meriden, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅利登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Whitacre于1272年出生在英国瓦維其可爾梅利登时，他的父亲Simon de Whitacre28岁，母亲Isolade DeWhitacre28岁。他和Richard de Whitacre至少有1个儿子。他去世于1300年在英国瓦維其可爾享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Whitacre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Whitaker
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Whitacre in Warwickshire or High Whitaker in Lancashire, both of whose names derive from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + æcer ‘field’. The name may also be derived from Wheatacre in Norfolk or Whiteacre in Waltham (Kent), both of which derive from Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’ + æcer ‘field’. Compare Whittaker .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Whitacre was born in 1272, in Meriden, Warwickshire, England, his father, Simon de Whitacre, was 28 and his mother, Isolade DeWhitacre, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Richard de Whitacre. He died in 1300, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Whitacre est né en 1272, à Meriden, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon de Whitacre, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Isolade DeWhitacre, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Richard de Whitacre. Il est décédé en 1300, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Whitacre 1272 in Meriden, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Whitacre 28 und seine Mutter Isolade DeWhitacre 28. Er hatte mit Richard de Whitacre mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1300 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Whitacre è nato il nel 1272 nel Meriden, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Simon de Whitacre, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Isolade DeWhitacre, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Richard de Whitacre. Morì nel 1300, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイア
ja.Meriden, Warwickshire, England: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメリデン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacreが1272年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメリデンで生まれた時，父Simon de Whitacreは28歳，母Isolade DeWhitacreは28歳であった。彼はRichard de Whitacreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1300年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Whitacre(이)가 1272년 영국 워윅실르 머이든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Whitacre(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolade DeWhitacre(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Richard de Whitacre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1300년 영국 워윅실르에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Meriden, Warwickshire, England: Meriden, Wæringscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Whitacre nasceu em 1272, em Meriden, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon de Whitacre, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Isolade DeWhitacre, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Richard de Whitacre. Ele faleceu em 1300, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Whitacre родился в 1272 г. в местности мириден, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon de Whitacre было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolade DeWhitacre, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Richard de Whitacre. Он умер в 1300 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Whitacre nació en 1272, en Meriden, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon de Whitacre, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Isolade DeWhitacre, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Richard de Whitacre. Murió en 1300, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años.
